SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LU, CAROL T SERVED MAR-13-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DABABNEH, IBRAHIM DBA LAGUNA SIDEWALK CAFE

LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT IBRAHIM DABABNEH DBA LAGUNA SIDEWALK CAFE'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF SHALL FILE AND SERVE ANY AMENDED COMPLAINT BY JUNE 5, 2009. DEFENDANT MAY FILE AND SERVE BY JUNE 15, 2009 ANY PLEADING THERETO. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: QUENTIN KOPP, REPORTER: WENDY PUN, CSR # 12891 301/QK

OPPOSITION TO DEFT SAN FRANCISCO ZEN CENTER'S DEMURRER TO SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT; MEMO P/A FILED BY PLAINTIFF LU, CAROL T

LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT IBRAHIM DABABNEH, DBA LAGUNA SIDEWALK CAFE'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT ALLEGED FACTS SHOWING THAT DEFENDANT OWED PLAINTIFF A DUTY TO PROTECT PLAINTIFF FROM CARS DRIVING INTO THE SIDEWALK OR THAT DEFENDANT'S PLACEMENT OF THE SEATING CAUSED HER INJURY. NOR HAS PLAINTIFF ALLEGED FACTS SHOWING THAT HER INJURIES RESULTED FROM DEFENDANT'S USING 4 TABLES RATHER THAN 2. DEFENDANT TO PREPARE FORM OF ORDER, JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 (301/PJB)
